mechanics.name_guess: 33_ In general, you simply choose path for
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 023 > history > 33_ In general, you simply choose path for
mechanics.excerpt: 33_ In general, you simply choose path for your character at each stage and follow the instructions for that path; exceptions are noted in the text: The various paths provide your growing character with skills traits and other characteristics based on the kind of life he or she leading at given stage_ Any subpath described as part of this pass under Next Path may be taken immediately after that path or subpath_ with: out moving on to the next stage Alternatively; character returns to path at later point; he or she may take the sub path on this subsequent pass (see Repeating Paths, p. 251.
